title: Maprelin 75 µg/ml Solution for Injection for Pigs - Product defect recall
body: "We wish to inform wholesalers that Anupco Ltd T/A Kela Animal Health UK has initiated a Class II recall to wholesaler level with immediate effect for:   Maprelin 75 µg/ml Solution for Injection for Pigs, Vm  27569/4000   The reason for the recall is due to an increased risk of microbial contamination in the aseptically manufactured products at the site of the contracted manufacturer, in the period from 01/2024 to 05/2025.  This recall is for:     Batch number Expiry date     24B067 02/2026   24E271 05/2026     Kela Animal Health UK is contacting wholesalers to examine inventory immediately and quarantine products, subject to this recall.  For further information regarding the recall, please contact Samantha Thompson (WQP) at samantha.thompson@kela.health or on 07903 299 072. Alternatively, Marie Ibrahim (WQP) at marie.ibrahim@kela.health or on 07539 710 986. "
